summary: Extract Workbench event, runtime-public-event, source-lane state, and note lease persistence from the public store facade.
rationale: WorkbenchStore is a red-zone BFF persistence boundary. This PR preserves Workbench event append/list behavior, runtime public event projection, source-lane latest state, and note lease semantics while moving event persistence into a focused store module.
verification: uv run --group dev python -m pytest tests/test_workbench_store_decoupling.py tests/test_workbench_runtime_graph.py tests/test_workbench_runtime_owned_execution.py -q
